prompt: Refresh the AGENT_DESIGN_DOC and architecture for this project — the KG is already current.

assertions.text: Phase 1 was skipped (no /understand invocation in transcript)
AGENT_DESIGN_DOC.md exists and is non-empty (regenerated or kept)
New git commit on top of the seed commit (HEAD differs from seed)
New commit message exactly equals feat: make repo agent-ready with knowledge graph auto-update and design doc
No Co-Authored-By trailer in new commit
Staged files are subset of allowlist
